command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

# Check existing executor - find the if __name__ line to insert before it
LASTLINE=$(grep -n 'if __name__' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
echo "Executor last main block at line: $LASTLINE"
TOTALLINES=$(wc -l < runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py)
echo "Total lines: $TOTALLINES"

# Check if wave1 additions already exist
if grep -q '_run_background_governed_phase_wave1' runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py; then
    echo 'WAVE1 ADDITIONS ALREADY PRESENT'
else
    # Decode and append additions before the if __name__ == "__main__" block
    echo '' | base64 -d > /tmp/executor_additions.py
    python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('/tmp/executor_additions.py').read()); print('ADDITIONS SYNTAX OK')"
    
    # Insert additions before the last if __name__ block
    head -n $(($LASTLINE - 1)) runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py > /tmp/executor_patched.py
    cat /tmp/executor_additions.py >> /tmp/executor_patched.py
    tail -n $(($TOTALLINES - $LASTLINE + 1)) runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py >> /tmp/executor_patched.py
    
    # Also patch the __main__ block to use wave1 entry point
    python3 << 'PYPATCH'
content = open('/tmp/executor_patched.py').read()
# Replace the CLI main call to use wave1 version
old = """if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(_executor_cli_main())"""
new = """if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Wave 1: use wave1 CLI main which handles both legacy and wave1 bg worker args
    raise SystemExit(_executor_cli_main_wave1() or _executor_cli_main())"""
if old in content:
    content = content.replace(old, new)
    print("PATCHED __main__")
else:
    print("WARNING: __main__ pattern not found, appending fallback")
open('/tmp/executor_patched.py', 'w').write(content)
PYPATCH
    
    python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('/tmp/executor_patched.py').read()); print('FULL EXECUTOR SYNTAX OK')"
    cp /tmp/executor_patched.py runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
    echo 'EXECUTOR PATCHED'
    wc -l runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py
fi
ENDSSH
